request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom, I worry about keeping our families safe. The world is getting more dangerous, and our military needs the resources to protect us. Some say we can't afford it, but what's the cost of being unprepared? Our allies are counting on us too. Let's make sure our defense budget reflects the real threats we face. #NationalSecurity #StrongDefense
